home.title: Rapid diagnostics built for the field
home.subtitle: Commercial-grade test kits and laboratory services, engineered from our own research and validated for clinical and field use.
home.flagshipDesc: Lateral-flow detection of Dengue NS1 antigen with results in 15 minutes. Built on our own VLP-validated antibody platform.

about.title: Commercial diagnostics, research-grade foundations
about.intro: Nirvana Biotech's commercial division brings our research division's validated platforms to clinics, labs, and distributors as ready-to-use products.
about.desc: Every kit we sell traces back to a published or in-progress research platform — we don't sell anything we haven't validated ourselves first.
about.highlightsHeading: Built different from a typical distributor

highlights.title: Research-Backed
highlights.desc: Every product is built on a platform our own research team developed and validated, not licensed or rebranded from elsewhere.

highlights.title: Field-Tested
highlights.desc: Kits are validated in real clinical and field conditions before commercial release, not just bench-tested.

highlights.title: Direct Support
highlights.desc: Procurement and technical questions go straight to the team that built the product, not a call center.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.subtitle: Diagnostic kits and reagents, ready to order.

products.name: Dengue NS1 Rapid Test Kit
products.desc: Lateral-flow antigen test for early-stage Dengue detection, 15-minute read time.

products.name: Dengue IgG/IgM Combo Kit
products.desc: Differentiates primary vs. secondary Dengue infection via combined antibody detection.

products.name: Aptamer-Based Screening Reagent
products.desc: High-affinity aptamer reagent kit for custom diagnostic assay development.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Lab and procurement support beyond off-the-shelf kits.

services.title: Custom Assay Development
services.desc: Tailored diagnostic assay design for specific pathogens or sample types, built on our aptamer and VLP platforms.

services.title: Bulk & Distributor Supply
services.desc: Volume pricing and logistics support for clinics, labs, and regional distributors.

services.title: Validation & QC Support
services.desc: Lab validation services to confirm kit performance under your specific operating conditions.

contact.title: Order or ask a question
contact.desc: For orders, bulk pricing, or technical questions, reach our commercial team directly.
